zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir George Douglas Master of Angus於1469年3月8日出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安時，他的父親Lord Archibald Douglas 5th Earl of Angus19歲，母親Elizabeth Boyd Countess of Angus19歲。他於大約1487年與Lady Elizabeth Drummond Countess of Angus在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1513年9月9日在英國諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓享年44歲，埋葬在英國諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir George Douglas Master of Angus于1469年3月8日出生在苏格兰米德洛迪安时，他的父亲Lord Archibald Douglas 5th Earl of Angus19岁，母亲Elizabeth Boyd Countess of Angus19岁。他于大约1487年与Lady Elizabeth Drummond Countess of Angus在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1513年9月9日在英国諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓享年44岁，埋葬在英国諾圖波藍德布藍斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir George Douglas Master of Angus was born on 8 March 1469, in Midlothian, Scotland, his father, Lord Archibald Douglas 5th Earl of Angus, was 19 and his mother, Elizabeth Boyd Countess of Angus, was 19. He married Lady Elizabeth Drummond Countess of Angus about 1487, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 9 September 1513, in Branxton, Northumberland, England, at the age of 44, and was buried in Branxton, Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir George Douglas Master of Angus est né le 8 mars 1469, à Midlothian, Écosse, son père, Lord Archibald Douglas 5th Earl of Angus, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Boyd Countess of Angus, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Drummond Countess of Angus environ 1487, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 9 septembre 1513, à Branxton, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Branxton, Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir George Douglas Master of Angus am 8. März 1469 in Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord Archibald Douglas 5th Earl of Angus 19 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Boyd Countess of Angus 19. Er hat um 1487 in Scotland Lady Elizabeth Drummond Countess of Angus geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 9. September 1513 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Branxton, Northumberland, England und wurde in Branxton, Northumberland, England begraben.

Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth Drummond Countess of Angus circa 1487, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Sir George Douglas Master of Angusが1469年3月8日にスコットランドミドロスアンで生まれた時，父Lord Archibald Douglas 5th Earl of Angusは19歳，母Elizabeth Boyd Countess of Angusは19歳であった。約1487年にスコットランドでLady Elizabeth Drummond Countess of Angusと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1513年9月9日にイギリスノースウンバーランドブランクストンで44歳で死去し，イギリスノースウンバーランドブランクストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir George Douglas Master of Angus(이)가 1469년 3월 8일 스컷랜드 미들로스이언에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord Archibald Douglas 5th Earl of Angus(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Boyd Countess of Angus(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1487년 스컷랜드에서 Lady Elizabeth Drummond Countess of Angus(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1513년 9월 9일 영국 노르스벌랜드 브랜스턴에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르스벌랜드 브랜스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir George Douglas Master of Angus nasceu em 8 de março de 1469, em Midlothian, Scotland, seu pai, Lord Archibald Douglas 5th Earl of Angus, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Boyd Countess of Angus, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth Drummond Countess of Angus aproximadamente 1487, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de setembro de 1513, em Branxton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Branxton, Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir George Douglas Master of Angus родился 8 марта 1469 г. в местности мидлотян, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Lord Archibald Douglas 5th Earl of Angus было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Boyd Countess of Angus, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Drummond Countess of Angus около 1487 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 9 сентября 1513 г. в местности бранкстон, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности бранкстон, нортумбирланд, Англия.
